title: First National Lok Adalat of 2026 to be held across country on March 14
description: The first National Lok Adalat of 2026 is set to be organised across the country on March 14, 2026, under the aegis of the National Legal Services Authority (NALSA).The National Lok Adalat will be held across High Courts, District Courts, Tribunals, Consumer Forums and Permanent Lok Adalats throughout the country on March 14, except in three States. In Delhi, the Lok Adalat will be held on March 22, 2026. In Telangana, it will be held on March 28. In West Bengal as well, it will be organised on a
